items.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
items.dek: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.
items.body: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Who is Viktor Orbán, Hungarian PM fighting to stay in power after 16 years?
items.dek: Since 2010, Orbán has transformed Hungary into what the European Parliament has denounced as a "hybrid regime of electoral autocracy".
items.body: Since 2010, Orbán has transformed Hungary into what the European Parliament has denounced as a "hybrid regime of electoral autocracy".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: California governor candidate Eric Swalwell denies sexual assault allegations
items.dek: The congressman is a leading Democratic candidate who is now facing calls to drop out of the race.
items.body: The congressman is a leading Democratic candidate who is now facing calls to drop out of the race.
